attributes.action: Government grant new oil & gas exploration, extraction licenses in North Sea
attributes.additional_details: Minimise the impact of global events on the UK economy and the people of the United Kingdom
attributes.background: In light of world events, open up the vast oil and gas reserves in the North Sea in order for the United Kingdom to reduce the impact of global events on the UK economy and people

rejection.details:
We already have a few petitions open asking for this (although one is broader in scope to involve coal fields). Some of these you may wish to sign:

https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/763065

https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/764924

https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/766352
